title: coccocypselum umbellatum
intro: Coccocypselum umbellatum, also known as the yellow bird-of-paradise, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Coccocypselum umbellatum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. Coccocypselum umbellatum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
